display_text: Doubloon, Cost: 0: Toggle item that converts 30% of your Max Health to Max Mana or 30% of your Max Mana to Max Health. Provides no base health or mana regeneration, serving as a flexible stat pool adjuster for heroes needing to balance their resource availability. Stats: CD: 5s, Conversion: 30%, Health Regen: +0, Mana Regen: +0.
